name: Specifically Attributable Taxes and Income Election

eligibility.description: Taxpayers must clearly demonstrate foreign taxes paid and income earned are attributable to specific operations to bypass the standard boycott factor fraction.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers may elect to use the specific attribution method instead of the international boycott factor to determine the amount of tax benefits lost, potentially reducing the penalty if boycott-related income is small relative to total operations.
